Phase-56.NAME: Premium Public Site and Auth
Phase-56.objective: Build a premium public entry and auth experience that presents KrotPN clearly while preserving verified-email gates.
Phase-56.non-goals: Changing registration backend semantics, billing catalog ownership, deploy/install scripts, or MTProto/VPN provisioning.

steps.step-1: Design public entry route with KrotPN offer, VPN value, free MTProto proxy value, tariffs, and CTA.
steps.step-2: Retune login/register/reset/verify screens with premium compact Matrix style and visible logo.
steps.step-3: Preserve spam-folder guidance, duplicate-email recovery CTA, and strong-password example.
steps.step-4: Preserve no-access-before-email-verification language and side-effect guards.
steps.step-5: Render tariff previews from existing canonical catalog shape without frontend price authority.
steps.step-6: Verify phone/tablet/desktop first viewport and reduced-motion auth readability.
steps.step-7: Create Phase-56 smoke markers for public routes, auth states, tariff canonicality, and email-proof guard.
steps.step-8: Run frontend build, screenshots, smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and protected surface guard.

Phase-56.acceptance: Public and auth surfaces feel premium and remain safe, compact, and truthful.
